title: MISTAKE: Spent too many iterations (6+ workflow runs) discovering Rai
content:
What went wrong: Spent too many iterations (6+ workflow runs) discovering Railway service name. Should have tried railway service status --all in the first debug workflow.
How to avoid: When debugging Railway CLI issues, always use --all flag on first attempt. Never assume service name from URL.

title: MISTAKE: Wasted user time with 6+ debug workflow iterations. Should h
content:
What went wrong: Wasted user time with 6+ debug workflow iterations. Should have used --all flag immediately. Also kept asking user to manually authorize device codes multiple times instead of finding a persistent auth solution.
How to avoid: 1. Always use --all or -v flags on first debug attempt. 2. Cache Railway auth locally instead of re-authenticating every session. 3. Stop making user do manual steps that should be automated.
